summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WhatsApp SaaS MVP (Phase 1). Backend API testing: 100% pass rate (22/22 tests). Frontend testing: Pages load correctly, but registration and login flows need fixes for full integration.

backend_issues.notes: All backend APIs working correctly. Health endpoints, auth flows, MFA, onboarding, messaging, webhooks, and tenant isolation all verified.

integration_issues.issue: Registration form validation prevents submission - 'Your name' field shows browser validation error even though it's optional in backend
integration_issues.details: The full_name field in RegisterPage.js doesn't have 'required' attribute, but browser validation is triggered. Need to either make it truly optional or add required attribute.

integration_issues.issue: Login with owner@demo.com shows MFA verification page unexpectedly
integration_issues.details: After successful login with owner@demo.com / Owner123!, user is redirected to MFA verification page. Backend seed.py shows mfa_enabled=False and mfa_required=False for this account. Need to investigate why MFA is being required.

integration_issues.issue: Launch Embedded Signup button not found with data-testid selector
integration_issues.details: Button exists in code but selector didn't match during test. May be a timing issue or button is conditionally rendered.

passed_tests: Backend: Login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: List WABAs (GET /api/wabas) with tenant isolation
Backend: List phone numbers (GET /api/phone-numbers) with tenant isolation
Backend: Idempotency (duplicate idempotency_key returns same message)
Backend: Webhook valid signature returns 200 in <1s
Backend: Tenant isolation (new tenant can't access other tenant's data)

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (7/10 user stories partially verified - pages load but some flows incomplete)

critical: Fix registration form: Either remove browser validation from 'Your name' field or make it truly required in the backend schema
high: Investigate MFA requirement for owner@demo.com: Login succeeds but redirects to MFA verification page despite mfa_enabled=False in seed data
medium: Verify Connect page Launch button is properly rendered and accessible
Add Mock Mode badge to admin shell topbar (US16 requirement)
low: Complete end-to-end testing of full user flows after above fixes

detailed_findings.backend_auth: Fully functional - register, login, MFA, password reset all working
detailed_findings.backend_messaging: Fully functional - send, list, idempotency, webhook simulation all working
detailed_findings.backend_webhooks: Fully functional - signature verification, event processing, worker updates all working
detailed_findings.backend_tenant_isolation: Fully functional - verified new tenants can't access other tenant's data
detailed_findings.frontend_pages: All pages load correctly with proper routing
detailed_findings.frontend_integration: Partial - pages load but registration and login flows have issues preventing full e2e testing
detailed_findings.mock_mode: Working correctly - all Meta API calls return mock data as expected
